message: Update to 1.1.2 - Critical database migration fix. Close Nova, delete %APPDATA%\site.pronova.demo\nova.db (backup first if you need data), then install this update and reopen.
releaseNotes: 1.1.2 - Fix SQLite migration 12 (near "-" syntax error). Migration SQL is now ASCII-only inline. Delete nova.db once, then reinstall/reopen.
